name: Raise Your Tribe
short_description: A hardcore tactical shooter with horror elements. Battle Machines and Mutants, and build your legacy on a deadly post-apocalyptic Cyberpunk Island. Explore dangerous zones, craft powerful gear, and shape your Cyberware build. Uncover secrets and fight to survive in a brutal, immersive world!
detailed_description:
IMPORTANT (I Can’t Promise the Game’s Future and It Is Not a Finished Project)
Development of my game is currently paused. The project has grown too large for me to complete alone, and without funding, I need to focus on my full-time job. I can’t promise when development will continue, but I do not intend to abandon the game, at least for now. This game is very important to me personally.

I’m truly sorry for the situation and appreciate your understanding. ABOUT RAISE YOUR TRIBE

  • An immersive survival experience that combines looter shooter, horror, survival mechanics, and realistic sim elements.

  • Highly optimized

  • A vast open world full of exploration opportunities

  • Play with your friends

  • Story with advanced dialog system

  • Base building

  • Vehicles

  • An online dedicated PvP server update will be added later, already tested with over 1,000 playtesters

  • And much more...
